LUMORA
grow your world
WASD to move · Click to farm · Progress saved
Welcome to Lumora
a cozy farming world

Welcome to Havenfield — a little valley where you’ll build a farm, befriend villagers, and explore a world that grows alongside you.

You’ll start in the heart of town. Explore the shops, meet the villagers, and when you’re ready — visit the Real Estate Office to buy your very own farm.

🌾
Farm
Till, plant, water, harvest — grow your plot into an empire
🏘
Town
Shops, crafting, a tavern, and a bustling trading post
💬
Villagers
NPCs with personalities — talk to them, give gifts, build friendships
🐾
Creatures
Adopt pets, hunt, fish, mine — the valley is full of surprises
Early Alpha — you’re one of the first people here. Things will break, features will change, and your feedback shapes what Lumora becomes. Thank you for being here.

Tab / IInventory

CCharacter editor
GGuild Hall

EnterOpen chat / send message
EscClose menus
Actions

HStart hunting (need shotgun)
